title: [circt-verilog][arcilator] `arcilator` fails to lower `llhd.constant_time` generated from simple SV delay (`#1`)

features.name: time delay in initial block
features.description: Code should include an initial block containing a #N absolute time delay statement followed by procedural signal assignments

features.name: output logic port assignment in initial block with delay
features.description: Code should include output logic ports that are assigned both before and after a time delay inside an initial block

features.name: $display system task after time delay in initial block
features.description: Code should include a $display system task called inside an initial block that follows a time delay statement
